---
pagetitle: "KDSC | ARISE Data"
toc: false
listing:
  - id: arise-listings
    contents: "./datasets/*.qmd"
    template: arise_listing.ejs
css: arise_style.css
---

## ARISE Data Repository {.main-header}

Browse datasets and data resources developed or used by the [ARISE](https://nsfepscor.ku.edu/track-1-arise){target="_blank"} program. Use the filters below to find datasets by category, institution, or keyword.

```{=html}
<div class="filter-container">
    <div class="filter-grid">
        <div class="filter-box">
            <label for="filterCategory" class="form-label fw-bold">By Data Category</label>
            <select id="filterCategory" class="form-select">
                <option value="all" selected>All Categories</option>
            </select>
        </div>
        <div class="filter-box">
            <label for="filterInstitution" class="form-label fw-bold">By Institution</label>
            <select id="filterInstitution" class="form-select">
                <option value="all" selected>All Institutions</option>
            </select>
        </div>
        <div class="filter-box">
            <label for="searchFilter" class="form-label fw-bold">By Keyword</label>
            <input type="text" id="searchFilter" class="form-control" placeholder="Type to search...">
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
```

<br>

::: {#arise-listings}
:::

```{=html}
<div id="no-results-message" style="display: none; text-align: center; padding: 2rem; font-size: 1.2em;">
    <p>No datasets match the selected filters. Please try a different combination.</p>
</div>
<div id="pagination-container" class="pagination-container"></div>

<div class="how-works-container" style="margin-top: 3rem;">
  <h2>Submit an ARISE Dataset</h2>
  <p>Use this form to submit a dataset or data resource for inclusion in the ARISE Data repository.</p>
  <p><a href="https://kusurvey.ca1.qualtrics.com/jfe/form/SV_9YzwFB0OYtwHxBk">ARISE Dataset Submission Form</a></p>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  setTimeout(initializeFiltersAndPagination, 100);
});

function initializeFiltersAndPagination() {
    const categoryFilter  = document.getElementById('filterCategory');
    const institutionFilter = document.getElementById('filterInstitution');
    const searchFilter    = document.getElementById('searchFilter');
    const itemList        = document.querySelector('#listing-arise-listings .item-list');
    const noResultsMessage  = document.getElementById('no-results-message');
    const paginationContainer = document.getElementById('pagination-container');

    if (!itemList) { return; }

    const allCards   = Array.from(itemList.querySelectorAll('.item-card'));
    let currentPage  = 1;
    const itemsPerPage = 9;

    function displayPage(items, page) {
        itemList.innerHTML = '';
        page--;
        const startIndex = itemsPerPage * page;
        const paginatedItems = items.slice(startIndex, startIndex + itemsPerPage);
        for (const item of paginatedItems) {
            itemList.appendChild(item);
        }
    }

    function setupPagination(items) {
        paginationContainer.innerHTML = '';
        const pageCount = Math.ceil(items.length / itemsPerPage);
        if (pageCount <= 1) return;
        for (let i = 1; i <= pageCount; i++) {
            const btn = document.createElement('button');
            btn.innerText = i;
            btn.classList.add('page-btn');
            if (i === currentPage) btn.classList.add('active');
            btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
                currentPage = i;
                displayPage(items, currentPage);
                let currentActive = document.querySelector('.pagination-container .active');
                if (currentActive) currentActive.classList.remove('active');
                btn.classList.add('active');
            });
            paginationContainer.appendChild(btn);
        }
    }

    function applyFilters() {
        const selectedCategory    = categoryFilter.value;
        const selectedInstitution = institutionFilter.value;
        const searchTerm          = searchFilter.value.toLowerCase().trim();

        const filteredCards = allCards.filter(card => {
            const category    = card.dataset.category    || '';
            const institution = card.dataset.institution || '';
            const cardText    = card.textContent.toLowerCase();

            const categoryMatch    = selectedCategory    === 'all' || category.includes(selectedCategory);
            const institutionMatch = selectedInstitution === 'all' || institution.includes(selectedInstitution);
            const searchMatch      = searchTerm === '' || cardText.includes(searchTerm);

            return categoryMatch && institutionMatch && searchMatch;
        });

        currentPage = 1;
        displayPage(filteredCards, currentPage);
        setupPagination(filteredCards);

        const hasResults = filteredCards.length > 0;
        itemList.style.display        = hasResults ? 'grid' : 'none';
        paginationContainer.style.display = hasResults ? 'flex' : 'none';
        noResultsMessage.style.display    = hasResults ? 'none' : 'block';
    }

    function populateFilters() {
        const categories   = new Set();
        const institutions = new Set();

        allCards.forEach(card => {
            (card.dataset.category    || '').split(',').forEach(c => c.trim() && categories.add(c.trim()));
            (card.dataset.institution || '').split(',').forEach(i => i.trim() && institutions.add(i.trim()));
        });

        const addOptions = (selectElement, optionsSet) => {
            Array.from(optionsSet).sort().forEach(option => {
                const newOption = document.createElement('option');
                newOption.value = option;
                newOption.textContent = option;
                selectElement.appendChild(newOption);
            });
        };

        addOptions(categoryFilter,   categories);
        addOptions(institutionFilter, institutions);
    }

    populateFilters();
    applyFilters();

    categoryFilter.addEventListener('change', applyFilters);
    institutionFilter.addEventListener('change', applyFilters);
    searchFilter.addEventListener('input', applyFilters);
}
</script>
```
